summary: NT Commerce Iteration 74 - P2 Integration Features Testing. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login, Dashboard, and Integration Status page all working correctly. All 5 integration cards displayed with correct status - Stripe configured, others awaiting API keys.
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 P2 integration routes properly implemented with correct authentication
Stripe has test key configured, checkout session creation working
SendGrid, WhatsApp, Yalidine show 'not configured' status correctly (expected - API keys not set)
Push notification system ready for VAPID key configuration
Integration status page shows all 5 cards with correct configured/not-configured badges
Good error handling - integrations return helpful messages when not configured
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 74 tested all P2 integration features. 5 new integration routes (Stripe, SendGrid, WhatsApp, Yalidine, Push) all working. Integration status page at /integrations/status shows all cards correctly. Stripe configured, others need API keys.

stripe_integration.POST /api/payments/create-checkout: PASS - returns checkout URL with test key

integration_config_status.sendgrid: Ready for API key - SENDGRID_API_KEY empty
integration_config_status.whatsapp: Ready for API key - WHATSAPP_API_TOKEN and WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID empty
integration_config_status.yalidine: Ready for API key - YALIDINE_API_ID and YALIDINE_API_TOKEN empty
integration_config_status.push: Ready for VAPID key - VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY and VAPID_EMAIL not set
